rule_text: Waves are fluid wave forms in two approved colorways (Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue), each available in long and short variants (assets in agr_lisraya_waves). Construction requires a top wave layer at 70% transparency over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality. Use only approved color values.
intent: Preserve the signature layered, translucent wave device with approved colorways only.
summary: Waves: fluid wave forms in Sunshine/Gold or Sky Blue/Deep Blue, long/short variants; top wave at 70% opacity layered over base, preserving translucency; use only approved colors.
